channel.title: 东方城市人文空间 · 文旅 — 深度中国城市旅行指南
channel.description: 以城市为窗，见华夏之美。探索11座中国城市的深度旅行指南：景点攻略、美食推荐、文化体验、出行贴士。

item.title: 北京 · Beijing — 东方城市深度旅行指南
item.description: 千年帝都，气象万千。长城日出、胡同深处、桌前现片的烤鸭——北京在古老与先锋之间自如呼吸。

item.title: Beijing Deep Travel Guide — Oriental Cities
item.description: The timeless capital where imperial grandeur meets cutting-edge modernity. Walk the Great Wall at sunrise, get lost in hutong alleyways, and taste Peking duck carved tableside.

item.title: 上海 · Shanghai — 东方城市深度旅行指南
item.description: 真正的东方遇见西方。外滩万国建筑与陆家嘴摩天楼隔江对望——上海是中国最国际化、最出片、最适合外国游客自由行的都市。

item.title: Shanghai Deep Travel Guide — Oriental Cities
item.description: Where East truly meets West. The Bund's colonial grandeur faces Pudong's sci-fi skyline across the Huangpu River — Shanghai is China's most cosmopolitan, photogenic, and accessible city for international travelers.

item.title: 成都 · Chengdu — 东方城市深度旅行指南
item.description: 熊猫之乡，火锅之城，一座重新定义'安逸'的城市。竹林里喝茶，听隔壁桌搓麻将——这就是成都。

item.title: Chengdu Deep Travel Guide — Oriental Cities
item.description: The land of pandas, fiery hotpot, and a pace of life that redefines 'relaxed'. Sip tea in a bamboo grove while locals play mahjong — this is Chengdu.

item.title: 西安 · Xi'an — 东方城市深度旅行指南
item.description: 丝绸之路的东方起点，兵马俑的故乡。回民街的烟火气已经飘了上千年。

item.title: Xi'an Deep Travel Guide — Oriental Cities
item.description: The ancient starting point of the Silk Road, home to the Terracotta Warriors and a Muslim Quarter that has been sizzling for over 1,000 years.

item.title: 杭州 · Hangzhou — 东方城市深度旅行指南
item.description: 马可·波罗称之为'天城'。西湖烟波、龙井茶园、千年古刹——杭州是中国最富诗意的城市。

item.title: Hangzhou Deep Travel Guide — Oriental Cities
item.description: Marco Polo called it 'the city of heaven'. West Lake's misty waters, Dragon Well tea terraces, and ancient temples make Hangzhou China's most poetic city.

item.title: 桂林 · Guilin — 东方城市深度旅行指南
item.description: 喀斯特峰林从雾江中拔起，如龙齿般嶙峋。桂林山水入画千年——亲眼所见比画更超现实。

item.title: Guilin Deep Travel Guide — Oriental Cities
item.description: Karst peaks rise from misty rivers like dragon's teeth. Guilin's landscapes have inspired Chinese scroll paintings for a thousand years — and they're even more surreal in person.

item.title: 乐山 · Leshan — 东方城市深度旅行指南
item.description: 三江汇流处，端坐着世界最大石刻佛像。乐山（古称嘉州）将山水仙境、千年古刹和不输成都的美食融为一体。慢下来——这座城有自己的节奏。

item.title: Leshan Deep Travel Guide — Oriental Cities
item.description: Where three rivers converge beneath the world's largest stone Buddha. Leshan (ancient Jiazhou) blends misty mountains, thousand-year temples, and a food scene that rivals Chengdu itself. Slow down — this city lives at its own pace.

item.title: 雅安 · Ya'an — 东方城市深度旅行指南
item.description: 川西咽喉，雨城雅韵。雅安是盆地与高原的交汇处，大熊猫的故乡、世界茶文化的发源地。一座被山水浸润的千年古城。

item.title: Ya'an Deep Travel Guide — Oriental Cities
item.description: Known as the 'Throat of Western Sichuan' and 'Rain City,' Ya'an is where the Sichuan Basin meets the Tibetan Plateau — a mist-shrouded land of giant pandas, ancient tea culture, and breathtaking mountain scenery.

item.title: 宜宾 · Yibin — 东方城市深度旅行指南
item.description: 两江相拥，长江始于此——'万里长江第一城'。2200年宝藏城市，藏万亩竹海、千年酒香和最地道的川南美食。

item.title: Yibin Deep Travel Guide — Oriental Cities
item.description: Where two rivers embrace to birth the Yangtze — China's 'First City on the Yangtze.' A 2,200-year-old treasure of bamboo seas, thousand-year baijiu, and legendary street food hiding in plain sight.

item.title: 重庆 · Chongqing — 东方城市深度旅行指南
item.description: 8D魔幻山城，轻轨穿楼、三千桥梁横跨两江。热辣火锅、赛博夜景、三千年巴渝文化，重庆是中国最颠覆想象的旅行目的地。

item.title: Chongqing Deep Travel Guide — Oriental Cities
item.description: An 8D mountain megacity where trains pass through buildings and 3,000 bridges span two rivers. Fiery hot pot, cyberpunk nightscapes, and 3,000 years of Ba-Yu culture make Chongqing China's most mind-bending destination.

item.title: 南京 · Nanjing — 东方城市深度旅行指南
item.description: 六朝古都，金陵如梦。中山陵肃穆，秦淮河婉约，乌衣巷的唐诗余韵犹在。漫步千年神道，夜泊桨声灯影，品金陵第一味盐水鸭。

item.title: Nanjing Deep Travel Guide — Oriental Cities
item.description: The ancient capital of six dynasties — where solemn mausoleums meet lantern-lit rivers, and Tang Dynasty poetry still echoes in old alleyways. Walk the Sacred Way, cruise the Qinhuai at night, taste the legendary salted duck.
